reports.title: Monthly Sector Review: Materials
reports.author: Research Team
reports.summary: Iron ore prices stabilised in February around $105/t as Chinese steel production rebounded post-Lunar New Year. Supply disruptions in Brazil provided additional support. Australian iron ore exporters remain well-positioned with weak AUD providing tailwind.

reports.title: Iron Ore Market Outlook Q2 2025
reports.author: Commodity Research
reports.summary: We maintain a constructive view on iron ore for Q2 2025. Chinese property stabilisation and infrastructure stimulus should support demand. Supply growth remains constrained. Price forecast: $95-110/t.

reports.title: Fenix Resources: Deep Dive Initiation
reports.author: Senior Analyst
reports.summary: Fenix Resources represents a compelling opportunity in the Australian iron ore space. Strong margins, debt-free balance sheet, and 8%+ dividend yield provide a favourable risk/reward at current levels. We initiate with a Buy rating and $0.72 price target.

reports.title: AUD/USD Macro Outlook
reports.author: Macro Research
reports.summary: AUD/USD remains pressured by China concerns but supported by commodity prices and RBA rate trajectory. Forecast: 0.64-0.68 range for next quarter. A weaker AUD benefits Australian commodity exporters.

reports.title: Small Cap Mining Screen: Value Opportunities
reports.author: Quantitative Research
reports.summary: Our screen of ASX small-cap mining stocks identifies Fenix Resources (FEX) as the top value pick based on EV/EBITDA, FCF yield, and dividend yield metrics. Trading at a 40% discount to larger peers on EV/EBITDA.
